name_en: Genuine quality, original factory leather version Small
name_cn:
Genuine quality, original factory leather version Small
( Miu Miu )💕 New bowling bag 👉5BB142, the velvet leather element is hot this autumn and winter. Top-grade top-grain velvet calf leather. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. New canvas lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers have this style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5cm 65050
